technical_replicate: each set of replicates (12 images each, n=3) was acquired with the same confocal settings.
experimental_design: DLC1 protein levels were markedly increased after short time treatment with the proteasome inhibitors bortezomib (BTZ) and MG-132.
number_of_fractions: no fractionation or pre-fractionation is described.
number_of_samples: Since no specific biological replicates are mentioned, we assume 1 sample.
